items.name: Rave graphic split white hoodie
items.description: Turn up the energy with our Rave Half-Print Hoodie! This eye-catching hoodie features a vibrant, rave-inspired graphic on one side, while the other half stays crisp and white, creating a striking contrast. Designed to match our Rave Half-Print Sweatpants, this hoodie is perfect for those who want to make a bold statement in any virtual world. Elevate your style and get ready to rave with this must-have piece!
